fields.label: Publish Date
fields.name: pubDate
fields.description: This is the date that will be used to sort your images in the gallery. It does not have to be the date the photo was taken.

fields.label: Sort Priority
fields.name: sortPriority
fields.description: Determines the order of the FAQs. Lower numbers (like 0 or 1) appear first.
